PAH_Interpretation: Preserved lung function with rapid decline risk
PAH_Rationale: VARDENAFIL fits Cluster 0 because PAH patients with preserved lung function but decline risk may benefit from early vasodilatory and anti-endothelin pathway hypotheses.
